fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: When unchecked, the Logto auth hook is skipped entirely.

fields.label: Logto Endpoint
fields.description: Logto tenant base URL, no trailing slash. Issuer is derived as <endpoint>/oidc.

fields.label: Audience (API Resource Indicator)
fields.description: The ERPNext API resource indicator registered in Logto. The token 'aud' claim must match this exactly. Each consumer app may register its OWN audience; this is the audience THIS site accepts.

fields.label: Userinfo URI
fields.description: Optional override. Defaults to <endpoint>/oidc/me (Logto's standard path).

fields.label: User Provisioning
fields.description: Logto access tokens carry only `sub` (per OIDC). Users are linked to Logto via `User.username = "logto:<sub>"`. On first sign-in for an unknown sub, the bridge calls /userinfo once to get email + name, then either links an existing User (by email) or provisions a new one.

fields.label: Auto Create User
fields.description: Provision an ERPNext User on first sign-in when no account matches the token's sub OR the email returned by /userinfo.
